name: Its All Frame Perfects
description: Every click is a frame perfect?!

enabled.name: Enable Mod
enabled.description: Turn the fake frame perfect labels and sounds on or off.

proc-rate.name: Sound Rate
proc-rate.description: How often a click should trigger a fake frame perfect sound and counter.

label-position.name: Label Position
label-position.description: Choose which corner the frame perfect label stack should sit in.

label-size.name: Label Size
label-size.description: Scale the frame perfect labels from 1x to 3x.

show-60.name: Show 60 FPS
show-60.description: Show the green 60 FPS fake frame perfect counter.

show-120.name: Show 120 FPS
show-120.description: Show the yellow and green 120 FPS fake frame perfect counter.

show-240.name: Show 240 FPS
show-240.description: Show the orange 240 FPS fake frame perfect counter.

show-360.name: Show 360 FPS
show-360.description: Show the red and orange 360 FPS fake frame perfect counter.

show-999.name: Show 999 FPS
show-999.description: Show the red 999 FPS fake frame perfect counter.
